commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Codex context projection to summarize omitted tool-call/tool-result activity by default, preserves redacted payload projection for thread bootstrap, and updates focused projection tests.

PR surface: Source +132, Tests +41. Total +173 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main defaults to elide mode and renders each toolCall/toolResult as an omitted stub, and the PR body includes before/after rollout logs for the same behavior. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
